title: Configuring repeater on Heltec v4 over USB

messages.author: shaunhey
messages.text: Hello, I have a Heltec v4 that I've successfully flashed with the repeater firmware using Chromium on Linux. My next step is to configure it using USB, as I am in the US and need to change the frequency preset. The problem is that neither the web tool (config dot meshcore dot dev) nor the meshcore-cli seem to be able to communicate with the device. Here's what I get from the cli with debug logging...
messages.content_html: Hello, I have a Heltec v4 that I've successfully flashed with the repeater firmware using Chromium on Linux. My next step is to configure it using USB, as I am in the US and need to change the frequency preset. The problem is that neither the web tool (config dot meshcore dot dev) nor the meshcore-cli seem to be able to communicate with the device. Here's what I get from the cli with debug logging...

messages.author: shaunhey
messages.text: Ok, after doing some more reading, I realized I could just connect to the device over serial and send commands directly. I used "screen /dev/ttyACM0 115200", for reference. Cheers!
messages.content_html: Ok, after doing some more reading, I realized I could just connect to the device over serial and send commands directly. I used "screen /dev/ttyACM0 115200", for reference. Cheers!
messages.reactions_html: 1
